C1.definition: Showing a lot of difference or diversity.
C1.thai: หลากหลาย
C1.example: The buffet offered a varied selection of international dishes.

C1.definition: A tube forming part of the blood circulation system, carrying deoxygenated blood towards the heart.
C1.thai: เส้นเลือด
C1.example: The nurse found a good vein to draw blood from.

C1.definition: Relating to or in the form of words.
C1.thai: ทางวาจา
C1.example: They reached a verbal agreement before signing the contract.

C1.definition: A decision on a disputed issue in a civil or criminal case or in an inquest.
C1.thai: คำตัดสิน
C1.example: The jury delivered a guilty verdict after hours of deliberation.

C1.definition: To make sure or demonstrate that something is true, accurate, or justified.
C1.thai: ตรวจสอบ
C1.example: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link provided.

C1.definition: A single line of poetry, or more generally, a piece of poetry or song.
C1.thai: บทกวี
C1.example: He recited a beautiful verse from his favorite poem.

C1.definition: In contrast or competition with.
C1.thai: เทียบกับ
C1.example: The match was Real Madrid versus Barcelona.

C1.definition: A ship or large boat.
C1.thai: เรือ
C1.example: A large cargo vessel docked at the port.

C1.definition: A person who has had long experience in a particular field or activity.
C1.thai: ผู้มีประสบการณ์
C1.example: She is a veteran journalist with over twenty years of experience.

C1.definition: Full of energy and enthusiasm; bright and striking.
C1.thai: มีชีวิตชีวา
C1.example: The city has a vibrant nightlife with many clubs and bars.

C1.definition: Immoral or wicked behavior.
C1.thai: ความชั่วร้าย
C1.example: Gambling is considered a vice by many religious groups.

C1.definition: Deliberately cruel or violent.
C1.thai: โหดร้าย
C1.example: The dog's vicious attack left the victim with serious injuries.

C1.definition: To fail to comply with a law, agreement, or rule.
C1.thai: ละเมิด
C1.example: You must not violate the terms of the contract.

C1.definition: An act that disregards an agreement or a right.
C1.thai: การละเมิด
C1.example: The company was fined for a serious safety violation.

C1.definition: Behavior showing high moral standards.
C1.thai: คุณธรรม
C1.example: Honesty is a virtue that is highly respected.

C1.definition: Relating to the voice or speech.
C1.thai: เกี่ยวกับเสียง
C1.example: She has a strong vocal performance in the musical.

C1.definition: To solemnly promise to do a particular thing or behave in a particular way.
C1.thai: ปฏิญาณ
C1.example: They vowed to support each other through thick and thin.

C1.definition: The quality or state of being exposed to the possibility of being attacked or harmed, either physically or emotionally.
C1.thai: ความเปราะบาง
C1.example: His vulnerability was evident in his hesitant response.

C1.definition: Susceptible to physical or emotional harm.
C1.thai: เปราะบาง
C1.example: Children are particularly vulnerable to the flu.

C1.definition: A room or area in a hospital or other institution for the care of patients or other persons.
C1.thai: หอผู้ป่วย
C1.example: She was admitted to the surgical ward yesterday.

C1.definition: A large building where raw materials or manufactured goods are stored prior to their distribution for sale.
C1.thai: คลังสินค้า
C1.example: The company has a large warehouse on the outskirts of the city.

C1.definition: The activity of fighting a war.
C1.thai: การสงคราม
C1.example: Modern warfare involves sophisticated technology.

C1.definition: A person who fights in battles; a soldier or combatant.
C1.thai: นักรบ
C1.example: The ancient warrior was known for his bravery.

C1.definition: To make or become weaker.
C1.thai: ทำให้/อ่อนแอลง
C1.example: The prolonged illness began to weaken him.

C1.definition: To form fabric by interlacing threads or strips of material.
C1.thai: ทอ
C1.example: She learned to weave intricate patterns on the loom.

C1.definition: A wild plant growing where it is not wanted and in competition with cultivated plants.
C1.thai: วัชพืช
C1.example: We spent the afternoon pulling weeds from the garden.

C1.definition: The state of being comfortable, healthy, or happy.
C1.thai: ความเป็นอยู่ที่ดี
C1.example: Regular exercise contributes to overall well-being.

C1.definition: Used in negative clauses or in questions to emphasize a lack of something.
C1.thai: ใดๆ ทั้งสิ้น
C1.example: He showed no interest whatsoever in the proposal.

C1.definition: By which; through which.
C1.thai: โดยที่
C1.example: The company has a system whereby all expenses are approved.

C1.definition: To strike or beat with a whip or a similar implement.
C1.thai: โบย/ตี
C1.example: The rider began to whip the horse to make it go faster.

C1.definition: Entirely; completely.
C1.thai: ทั้งหมด
C1.example: The project was wholly funded by private donations.

C1.definition: To make or become wider.
C1.thai: ทำให้/กว้างขึ้น
C1.example: The road will be widened to ease traffic congestion.

C1.definition: A woman whose spouse has died.
C1.thai: แม่ม่าย
C1.example: The widow inherited her husband's estate.

C1.definition: The measurement or extent of something from side to side.
C1.thai: ความกว้าง
C1.example: Please measure the width of the doorway.

C1.definition: The quality or state of being prepared to do something; readiness.
C1.thai: ความเต็มใจ
C1.example: Her willingness to help was greatly appreciated.

C1.definition: To rub something with a cloth or other absorbent material to clean or dry it.
C1.thai: เช็ด
C1.example: Please wipe the table after you finish eating.

C1.definition: Mental sharpness and inventiveness; keen intelligence.
C1.thai: ไหวพริบ
C1.example: He impressed everyone with his quick wit and humor.

C1.definition: The action of withdrawing something.
C1.thai: การถอน
C1.example: The bank processed the withdrawal of funds from his account.

C1.definition: A period of physical exercise designed to improve fitness or health.
C1.thai: การออกกำลังกาย
C1.example: She goes to the gym for a strenuous workout every morning.

C1.definition: Enjoyable or useful enough to be worth the time or effort spent.
C1.thai: คุ้มค่า
C1.example: Volunteering at the animal shelter was a truly worthwhile experience.

C1.definition: Having or showing the qualities or skills that entitle one to notice, respect, or admiration.
C1.thai: คู่ควร
C1.example: He is a worthy successor to the company's founder.

C1.definition: To shout something loudly and forcefully, often in anger or excitement.
C1.thai: ตะโกน
C1.example: The crowd began to yell with delight when the team scored.
